description: REQ-006 states serializeNote is 'a pure function: no I/O, no port calls, deterministic.' REQ-016 reiterates 'serializeNote calls no ports and has no side effects.' Yet workflows.md Step 2 lists 'FrontmatterSerializer.toYaml(fm): string' as a dependency, and the verification architecture lists FrontmatterSerializerToYaml as a Port Contract. The canonical CaptureDeps in ports.ts does NOT include FrontmatterSerializer. The verification architecture simultaneously calls it a port and claims serializeNote is pure with no port dependencies.
